title: Chemistry — Organic Basics
description: Functional groups table and reaction-type decision flowchart.

blocks.title: Common groups
blocks.markdown:
| Group | Pattern |
|-------|--------|
| Alkane | C–C single |
| Alkene | C=C |
| Alcohol | R–OH |
| Carbonyl | C=O |
| Carboxylic acid | –COOH |
| Amine | –NH2 |

blocks.title: Classify reaction
blocks.mermaid:
flowchart TD
  A[Look at change] --> B{Bonds broken/formed?}
  B -->|π → σ| C[Addition]
  B -->|σ → π| D[Elimination]
  B -->|Atom swap| E[Substitution]
  B -->|Rearrange| F[Rearrangement]
